channel.title: Swayam Maheshwari - Fullstack Developer Portfolio
channel.description: Portfolio of Swayam Maheshwari, Fullstack Developer specializing in MERN Stack, TypeScript, and AI-powered web apps.

item.title: Portfolio Updated - May 2025
item.description: Updated portfolio with latest projects, skills, and experience. Added comprehensive SEO and AI discoverability features.
item.author: swayammaheshwari890@gmail.com (Swayam Maheshwari)

item.title: TechDoc - AI-First API Documentation Platform
item.description: AI-first API documentation platform (OpenAI, Pinecone, Yjs, GCP Cloud Run) serving 1.78k+ daily users. Features semantic search and real-time collaboration.
item.author: swayammaheshwari890@gmail.com (Swayam Maheshwari)

item.title: Home Deco AI - AI Interior Design Tool
item.description: AI interior design tool that converts text prompts into realistic room visuals using OpenAI. Implemented semantic vector search for layout suggestions with Pinecone.
item.author: swayammaheshwari890@gmail.com (Swayam Maheshwari)

item.title: NewsAI - Real-time News Assistant
item.description: Chat-based AI assistant that answers real-time news queries with dynamic summaries from live global sources using NewsAPI and OpenAI.
item.author: swayammaheshwari890@gmail.com (Swayam Maheshwari)

item.title: Through Us - Modern Blogging Platform
item.description: A sleek blogging platform featuring comprehensive Markdown support, secure Google Sign-In authentication, and a real-time autosave feature for seamless writing.
item.author: swayammaheshwari890@gmail.com (Swayam Maheshwari)
